subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which the All-Merciful hath revealed unto all who dwell in the realm of possibility, that He may draw them nigh unto His Kingdom and give them to drink of this Kawthar [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب انزله الرحمن لمن فی الامکان لیقربهم الی ملکوته و یسقیهم هذا الکوثر
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @chastisement and requital, @living waters; water of life, @praise and encouragement
